description_long: This house features a modern, angular design with a mix of flat and sloped roofs, white brick exterior walls, and large glass windows. A prominent tree is integrated into the landscape, providing natural shade and visual interest. The structure includes a green sloped lawn area, a partially open courtyard, and a rooftop section with patterned tiles. The rear of the house showcases a large glass sliding door leading into a room with visible furniture, while the side reveals a long horizontal window and smaller window openings. Decorative plants and outdoor seating are visible near the main entrance, enhancing curb appeal. The overall design emphasizes open spaces, natural light, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern white brick house with angular roofs, large glass windows, and integrated greenery, featuring open spaces and a blend of indoor-outdoor elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sloped green lawn, a large tree, and a mix of window sizes including a long horizontal window.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the sloped roof, open courtyard, and the tree extending above the structure.
description_view_2: Back view with a large glass sliding door revealing interior furniture and a flat roof section.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main entrance with decorative plants, a glass-walled room, and the tree adjacent to the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and horizontal strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, flanked by decorative plants and a small paved area, no porch or overhang.
